sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29182" key="duskrinh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δυσ-κρῐνής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n29182.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hard to distinguish</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.922a</biblScope> </bibl>; <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> sq., <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg005:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
